# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for kong no auth and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: kong_no_auth

- 200
          request_method:
            - GET
          content_type:
            - application/json
          cache_ttl: 300
          strategy: memory
          memory:
            dictionary_name: kong_db_cache
    routes:
      - name: product-service-list-products
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        tags:
          - product-read

      - name: product-service-create-product
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        tags:
          - product-write

      - name: product-service-product-by-id
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products/(?P<product_id>[a-f0-9\-]+)$
        methods:
          - GET
          - PUT
          - PATCH
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        tags:
          - product-crud

      - name: product-service-categories
        paths:
          - /api/v1/categories
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        tags:
          - category

      - name: product-service-search
        paths:
          - /api/v1/products/search
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        tags:
          - product-search

  # ===========================================================================
  # Payment Service (Critical - Extra Security)
  # ===========================================================================
  - name: payment-service
    url: https://payment-service-upstream:8443
    protocol: https
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    retries: 1
    tags:
      - payment-service
      - critical
      - pci
    plugins:
      - name: acl
        config:
          allow:
            - internal-group
          hide_groups_header: true
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Forwarded-Service: payment-service"
              - "X-Internal-Auth: ${vault://env/PAYMENT_SERVICE_INTERNAL_TOKEN}"
      # Strict rate limiting for payment endpoints
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 5
          minute: 60
          hour: 500
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: false
      # Additional IP restriction for payment service
      - name: ip-restriction
        config:
          allow:
            - 10.0.0.0/8
          status: 403
          message: "Access denied: Payment service restricted"
      # mTLS for payment service
      - name: mtls-auth
        config:
          revocation_check_mode: SKIP
          skip_consumer_lookup: false
    routes:
      - name: payment-service-process-payment
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payments
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        plugins:
          - name: request-validator
            config:
              body_schema: |
                {
                  "type": "object",
                  "required": ["order_id", "amount", "currency", "payment_method"],
                  "properties": {
                    "order_id": { "type": "string" },
                    "amount": { "type": "number", "minimum": 0.01 },
                    "currency": { "type": "string", "enum": ["USD", "EUR", "GBP"] },
                    "payment_method": { "type": "string" }
                  },
                  "additionalProperties": false
                }
              verbose_response: false
        tags:
          - payment-write
          - critical

      - name: payment-service-get-payment
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payments/(?P<payment_id>[a-f0-9\-]+)$
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        tags:
          - payment-read

      - name: payment-service-refund
        paths:
          - /api/v1/payments/(?P<payment_id>[a-f0-9\-]+)/refund$
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        tags:
          - payment-refund
          - critical

  # ===========================================================================
  # Notification Service
  # ===========================================================================
  - name: notification-service
    url: https://notification-service-upstream:8443
    protocol: https
    connect_timeout: 10000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    retries: 3
    tags:
      - notification-service
    plugins:
      - name: acl
        config:
          allow:
            - internal-group
          hide_groups_header: true
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Forwarded-Service: notification-service"
              - "X-Internal-Auth: ${vault://env/NOTIFICATION_SERVICE_INTERNAL_TOKEN}"
    routes:
      - name: notification-service-send
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notifications
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        plugins:
          - name: request-validator
            config:
              body_schema: |
                {
                  "type": "object",
                  "required": ["recipient", "type", "message"],
                  "properties": {
                    "recipient": { "type": "string" },
                    "type": { "type": "string", "enum": ["email", "sms", "push"] },
                    "message": { "type": "string", "maxLength": 5000 },
                    "subject": { "type": "string", "maxLength": 255 }
                  },
                  "additionalProperties": false
                }
              verbose_response: false
        tags:
          - notification-write

      - name: notification-service-get-notifications
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notifications
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        tags:
          - notification-read

      - name: notification-service-by-id
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notifications/(?P<notification_id>[a-f0-9\-]+)$
        methods:
          - GET
          - DELETE
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        tags:
          - notification-crud

  # ===========================================================================
  # Analytics Service
  # ===========================================================================
  - name: analytics-service
    url: https://analytics-service-upstream:8443
    protocol: https
    connect_timeout: 10000
    write_timeout: 60000
    read_timeout: 120000
    retries: 2
    tags:
      - analytics-service
    plugins:
      - name: acl
        config:
          allow:
            - internal-group
          hide_groups_header: true
      - name: request-transformer
        config:
          add:
            headers:
              - "X-Forwarded-Service: analytics-service"
              - "X-Internal-Auth: ${vault://env/ANALYTICS_SERVICE_INTERNAL_TOKEN}"
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 5
          minute: 100
          hour: 1000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
    routes:
      - name: analytics-service-events
        paths:
          - /api/v1/analytics/events
        methods:
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        tags:
          - analytics-write

      - name: analytics-service-reports
        paths:
          - /api/v1/analytics/reports
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        tags:
          - analytics-read

      - name: analytics-service-dashboards
        paths:
          - /api/v1/analytics/dashboards
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        tags:
          - analytics-dashboard

  # ===========================================================================
  # Health Check Endpoint (Internal only, still authenticated)
  # ===========================================================================
  - name: health-check-service
    url: https://localhost:8443
    protocol: https
    connect_timeout: 5000
    write_timeout: 5000
    read_timeout: 5000
    retries: 0
    tags:
      - health
      - internal
    plugins:
      - name: acl
        config:
          allow:
            - internal-group
          hide_groups_header: true
      - name: ip-restriction
        config:
          allow:
            - 10.0.0.0/8
            - 127.0.0.1/32
          status: 403
          message: "Access denied: Health endpoint restricted"
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 10
          minute: 100
          policy: local
    routes:
      - name: gateway-health
        paths:
          - /health
        methods:
          - GET
        protocols:
          - https
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: false
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
        tags:
          - health
